title: レビューって半分賭けじゃん？

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, while I'm making my way through the
school halls...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
choice_data_list: What's wrong? Do you feel sick?
What's wrong? Do you feel sick?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Not really, but... Well, actually, yeah. Kinda.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
So I bought this viral tail oil everyone's been
raving about on Umastagram...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
But it makes my tail all sticky when I run! And
then all this dirt and grass gets stuck in it!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I was gonna go out with my friends, but I can't let
them see me with my tail looking gross as hell...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, real talk? Tail care is already a literal pain
in the butt, and this just made it so much worse.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Seriously, this high-key sucks! Especially on the
muddy courses! No matter how much I wash my
tail after, there's still mud in it!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
But I'm kinda stuck on what to do now. I spent
good money on this garbage, so I don't wanna
throw it away...
choice_data_list: You can just use it on your days off.
You can use it for something else.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
You're so right! I'll just use it when I don't have to
run!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
All right, problem solved! As a reward, I'm gonna
go buy myself some snacks!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
What can I even use it for if not as an oil
treatment, though?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Hang on, lemme look it up... "You can add it to
normal conditioner to boost its quality."

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Talk about a luck break! Looks like I didn't waste
my money after all. Thanks for the save! ☆
